name: audience-insight
description: Produce audience-fit notes that connect audience need state to script decisions.
fallback_behavior: If the audience is underspecified, infer one primary segment and one adjacent segment, then report confidence and risk.
notes: Dual-protocol skill: protocol_id=wp.audience-fit-note for audience_fit_note output; router additionally maps audience_proxy_report output via wp.audience-proxy-review. linked_atoms is the union of both protocols' requirements.
